errors.limitReached: Daily free limit reached. Try again tomorrow or purchase credits.

errors.styleForbidden: This style is not available in free mode.
errors.invalidFileType: Only JPEG, PNG, and WebP are supported (no SVG or GIF)
errors.fileTooLarge: File size must be 5 MB or less
errors.imageTooSmall: Image must be at least 256×256 px
errors.imageTooLarge: Image must be 4096×4096 px or smaller
errors.nsfwContent: Could not generate due to safety restrictions
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again
errors.geminiFailed: Image generation failed. Please try again later.
errors.safetyBlocked: Generation was blocked for safety reasons.

stylePrompts.anime_basic: Premium 2D Japanese anime illustration in Korean webtoon style. Flat cel-shading in warm peach tones with crisp black outlines; enlarged brown eyes with star catchlights; honey-amber hair with white highlight streaks; soft warm gradient background. Pure 2D, no 3D rendering.
stylePrompts.soft_cartoon: Luxury 2D editorial illustration — Vogue Japan beauty campaign aesthetic. Feather-light pencil lines with layered ivory, rose, and mauve watercolor washes; cold-press paper grain visible throughout; loose gestural hair strokes. Airy, elegant, handcrafted 2D art.
stylePrompts.cute_pet: Super-adorable 2D kawaii anime animal character in Sanrio studio quality. Huge sparkling eyes with heart-shaped highlights, fluffy rounded ears, rosy circular cheek blush, floating stars and sparkles background. Pure 2D illustration.
stylePrompts.simple_icon: Ultra-minimal flat graphic design icon, Saul Bass mid-century modern style. Exactly 3 solid colors (terracotta background + dark silhouette + cream accent), zero gradients, clean vector silhouette. Brand logomark quality. Pure 2D flat design.
stylePrompts.3d_cartoon: Pixar / Illumination feature-film quality 3D CGI animated character render. Multi-layer subsurface scattering skin, volumetric 3-point studio lighting (warm amber key + cool blue fill + warm orange rim), rounded 3D cornea eyes with perfect catchlights. Full 3D cinematic render.
stylePrompts.anime_pro: Masterpiece-quality 2D anime illustration — Demon Slayer / Jujutsu Kaisen visual standard. Deep navy background with electric blue rim light; complex iris gradients with glass teardrop highlights; dramatic 3-quarter shadow; high-contrast cel-shading. Pure 2D, no 3D.
stylePrompts.soft_storybook: Enchanting hand-painted watercolor illustration — Studio Ghibli warmth combined with Beatrix Potter delicacy. Wet-on-wet 300gsm paper technique, warm golden palette, visible cold-press paper grain, loose gestural brushwork, no black shadows. Pure 2D watercolor.
stylePrompts.cyberpunk: Cinematic cyberpunk portrait — Blade Runner 2049 × Ghost in the Shell aesthetic. Electric magenta and cyan rim lights, rain-damp skin with neon flare reflections, bioluminescent circuit traces at the temple, only neon wavelengths retain full saturation against near-black shadows.
stylePrompts.comic_hero: Premium American superhero comic book illustration — Alex Ross painted quality with Jack Kirby dynamism. Variable-weight ink lines (3–4pt outlines), fully saturated flat primary colors, halftone dot shadows, pure white highlights, bold speed-line background. 2D comic illustration.
stylePrompts.fashion_avatar: Ultra-luxury editorial fashion portrait photography — Vogue / System Magazine cover standard. Warm golden Rembrandt key light (45° upper-right), Kodak Portra 400 film color grade, soft-box catchlight at 11 o'clock, impeccable golden-amber skin rendition.
stylePrompts.business_profile: Premium professional corporate headshot — Fortune 500 executive photography standard. Three-point studio lighting (octabox key + reflector fill + rim strip box), neutral gray background, natural skin retouching with real pore texture, composed confident expression.
stylePrompts.pet_portrait_pro: World-class hyperrealistic fine-art animal portrait — David Yarrow level. Individual fur strand micro-precision, dramatic Rembrandt key light with translucent rim glow on fur edges, complex iris cellular detail, perfect wet-cornea catchlight, jewel-toned bokeh background.
stylePrompts.couple_avatar: Romantic 2D anime couple portrait — premium visual novel key visual quality. Intimate overlapping composition, warm amber and rose anime eyes for both, golden backlight halo, all-warm rose-gold and peach color palette. Pure 2D, no 3D.
stylePrompts.kawaii_icon: Professional super-cute chibi anime icon — Sanrio character design studio quality. Extreme chibi proportions, enormous eyes (45–50% of face) with multi-layer iris gradients, oval catchlight, star-burst sparkles, and heart highlights; round cheek blush; pastel hair with decorative bow. Pure 2D.
stylePrompts.ghibli: Studio Ghibli hand-drawn animated portrait — Miyazaki aesthetic, warm earth tones, soft Spirited Away / Howl quality. Clean key-frame linework, muted ochre skin, wind-touched hair, atmospheric golden-hour background. Pure 2D hand-drawn animation.
stylePrompts.oil_painting: Classical oil painting portrait — Vermeer natural light and Sargent brushwork. Visible impasto brushstrokes, Rembrandt triangle lighting, multi-layer transparent glazes, warm golden skin tones on fine linen canvas texture.
stylePrompts.pixel_art: Retro 16-bit pixel art portrait — SNES Neo-Geo sprite quality. Strictly limited 16-color palette, visible square pixels, 1-pixel black outlines, checkerboard dithering at transitions, pure white specular dots. No anti-aliasing.
stylePrompts.pop_art: Bold Andy Warhol / Roy Lichtenstein pop art portrait — flat solid fills, Ben-Day dot shadow pattern at 45°, thick uniform black outlines, exactly 4 fully-saturated colors. 2D screen-print aesthetic, no gradients.
stylePrompts.pencil_sketch: Fine-art graphite portrait drawing — academic realist tradition. Direction-sensitive hatching on cream paper, tonal range from white paper to confident mid-shadow. Eyes the most detailed area. No color, no digital sheen.
stylePrompts.van_gogh: Post-impressionist portrait — Van Gogh style. Short swirling directional brushstrokes, intense pure pigments (cadmium yellow, Prussian blue, vermillion), visible dark contour lines, dynamic textured background.
stylePrompts.lego_figure: Official LEGO minifigure portrait — cylindrical ABS plastic head, printed 2D facial features, barrel-shaped body, C-shaped claw hands. Glossy plastic material, clean studio product photography lighting.
stylePrompts.action_figure: Premium 1:12 scale collectible action figure in retail window box — Bandai S.H.Figuarts photography standard. Visible joint articulation, injection-molded plastic skin, silver foil packaging, studio product lighting.
stylePrompts.claymation: Aardman stop-motion claymation character — Wallace & Gromit quality. Hand-sculpted plasticine with visible finger-press texture, oversized expressive eyes, clay-roll hair, primary-color claymation set background.
stylePrompts.sumi_e: Traditional East Asian ink brush painting — Sumi-e calligraphy tradition. Raw ink on rice paper, 5-tone monochrome palette, confident single-pass brushstrokes, generous empty white space, red chop seal stamp.
stylePrompts.dark_fantasy: Dark fantasy RPG character portrait — Elden Ring / Diablo IV concept art quality. Near-black background with spectral blue rim light, glowing ember-orange accent, ancient rune armor, supernatural glowing eyes.
stylePrompts.kpop_idol: K-pop idol editorial portrait — HYBE SM Entertainment promo quality. Flawless glass skin, premium K-pop glow studio lighting, precision idol makeup, salon-perfect hair, clean bright color grade.
stylePrompts.neon_portrait: Retrowave synthwave neon art portrait — pure black background, three neon tube lights (hot magenta-pink, electric cyan, deep violet), glowing outlines with radiant bloom, faint retro grid lines.
stylePrompts.vintage_film: Vintage Kodachrome 64 film photography portrait — 1970s–80s aesthetic. Prominent silver halide grain, warm golden-amber highlights, lifted blacks with green-cyan shadow tint, slight barrel distortion, corner focus falloff.
stylePrompts.ukiyo_e: Traditional Ukiyo-e woodblock print portrait — Edo period Utamaro bijin-ga quality. Flat ink-block color passes, variable-width calligraphy key-block outlines, traditional mineral pigments, washi paper texture.
stylePrompts.tarot_card: Mystical tarot card illustration — Rider-Waite-Smith tradition. Ornate gold-foil border with Art Nouveau decoration, Gothic card name lettering, rich jewel tones against midnight blue, esoteric symbolic imagery.
stylePrompts.webtoon: Korean Naver Webtoon Manhwa illustration — True Beauty / Solo Leveling quality. Clean precise digital linework, Korean beauty character design, soft cell-shading, smooth even-toned skin, subtle sparkle catchlight.
stylePrompts.sticker_art: Premium LINE sticker character — Creators Market award quality. Bold white outline border surrounding the entire character, kawaii expressive face, bright saturated candy colors, floating sparkles and hearts.
stylePrompts.3d_clay: 3D clay material render — Blender Cycles / Laika Studios Coraline quality. Matte clay polymer shader with soft subsurface scattering, hand-sculpted surface texture, glass marble eye inserts, warm studio lighting.
stylePrompts.impressionist: French Impressionist portrait — Monet color palette, Mary Cassatt intimacy. Broken complementary color brushwork, light-saturated palette with pale lilac shadows and yellow-green highlights, soft atmospheric edges.

styleDesc.dark_fantasy: Elden Ring dark RPG character art

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start for free, upgrade when you need more

faq.title: FAQ
faq.a1: No, credits never expire once purchased.
faq.q2: Do I get charged if generation fails?
faq.a2: No, credits are only deducted on successful generation.
faq.a3: JPG, PNG, and WebP up to 10MB. Best results with a clear face photo.
faq.a4: You do. Generated images are yours for personal and commercial use.
